Goal: Server version, build, CU, GDR, KB, lifecycle and offline documentation links
AcceptanceSummary: Exact and unknown builds, branches, stale catalog and lifecycle tested on SQL Server 2019 2022 2025

Goal: Preserve XML as native xml for plans deadlocks and Extended Events with explicit fallback status
AcceptanceSummary: RAW and TABLE preserve xml; invalid large deep and text-only payloads remain distinguishable

Goal: Expose compiled and available runtime parameter evidence with source time completeness and status
AcceptanceSummary: Compiled runtime unavailable null and local-variable-not-exposed cases remain distinct without automatic configuration changes

Goal: Consolidate statement batch input request session connection transaction wait memory and execution context
AcceptanceSummary: One materialized read per source with explicit capture time truncation partiality and permission status

Goal: Add high-value plan warnings operator runtime feedback PSP OPPO Query Store and cache context
AcceptanceSummary: Targeted bounded reusable paths with false-positive guards and no automatic tuning or tracing

Goal: Add statement-safe version-adaptive plan analysis with evidence JSON targeted metadata workload profiles and privacy-safe histogram mapping
AcceptanceSummary: Dedicated minimal installer plus Install_All integration; SQL Server 2019 2022 2025 release gates permission matrices and output matrix passed; isolated SQL Server 2025 installer passed; DERIVED_ONLY histogram default; no automatic query execution or tuning

Goal: Make source time scope freshness aggregation inference and evidence limits explicit
AcceptanceSummary: Null never conflates absent uncollected denied unsupported evicted oversized too-deep or invalid evidence

Goal: Integrate named result sets schemas TABLE validation and three-version runtime tests
AcceptanceSummary: SQL Server 2019 2022 2025 plus documentation privacy nonblocking and commit gates pass

Goal: Make every configured string truncation visible measurable and removable without an artificial MAX payload ceiling
AcceptanceSummary: Positive limits truncate projection only; zero is unlimited; per-row length bytes and truncation flag plus one warning with parameter and largest required length; Unicode-safe SQL Server 2019 2022 2025 tests

Goal: Analyze database options scoped overrides Query Store settings and local cross-database drift
AcceptanceSummary: SQL Server 2019 2022 2025 empty denied heterogeneous and explicit-profile cases; drift remains a finding rather than an automatic error

Goal: Correlate worker availability scheduler queues THREADPOOL blocking and bounded sample deltas
AcceptanceSummary: Snapshot sample reset denied and controlled queue cases; never recommend max worker threads from one indicator

Goal: Add a named pendingIo result set with duration layer file scheduler request and wait correlation
AcceptanceSummary: Empty short repeated denied and bounded-detail cases; one pending request is not classified as storage failure

Goal: Read bounded SQL Server and optional Agent error logs into categories counts time range and partial source status
PrimaryObjects: USP_ErrorLogAnalysis|sys.sp_readerrorlog|SQL Server error log|SQL Server Agent error log
AcceptanceSummary: Archive time keyword permission large-log and text-opt-in cases; no log rotation and no default full message output

Goal: Analyze supported vector index state performance and maintenance evidence beyond capability inventory
AcceptanceSummary: No-feature active maintenance empty denied and bounded cross-database cases with feature detection before reference

Goal: Add supported JSON indexes and paths to existing object and index inventories
AcceptanceSummary: No-feature empty visible and denied cases; inventory does not imply health and no dedicated procedure is required initially

Goal: Expose workload-group TempDB limits current and peak use and limit violation counts
AcceptanceSummary: Not configured configured violation reset denied and unsupported cases; limits use and violations remain distinct

Goal: Preserve replica role and source metadata for statistics created or maintained on readable secondaries
AcceptanceSummary: 2019 2022 2025 primary secondary unsupported denied and partial metadata cases

Goal: Make Query Store analyses replica-aware instead of detecting sys.query_store_replicas only as a capability
AcceptanceSummary: Primary secondary disabled unsupported cleanup denied and partial replica evidence cases

Goal: Inventory visible linked-server configuration providers and waits with optional bounded connectivity test
AcceptanceSummary: No linked server legacy provider denied timeout and opt-in test cases; default performs no remote access

Goal: Expose persisted edition features and uncontained dependencies for restore edition change and migration
AcceptanceSummary: Portable feature-bound uncontained unsupported denied and cross-version cases without automatic DDL

Goal: Add bounded opt-in current cursor resource and dormancy evidence to session analysis
AcceptanceSummary: No cursor active dormant high-cost denied and session-scoped limit cases; cursor existence alone is not a defect

Goal: Analyze size growth and retention of backup restore job mail and maintenance histories
AcceptanceSummary: Empty short-retention long-retention growth denied and bounded-history cases; no cleanup is executed

Goal: Inventory visible user objects in master model and msdb as maintenance and portability evidence
AcceptanceSummary: Empty synthetic object denied and partial-visibility cases; no object is dropped moved or altered
